title: haw.plugin.report/1
description: The report a plugin prints to stdout after running for a lifecycle phase. haw parses this to collect artifacts, findings, and the ok/summary verdict.

plugin.description: The plugin's own name ("sbom" for haw-sbom).

phase.description: The lifecycle phase this report is for, if any.

ok.description: Whether the plugin considers the operation acceptable. A pre-* plugin returning false may abort the operation; post-* reports are advisory.

summary.description: A one-line human summary. Defaults to empty when omitted.

artifacts.description: Artifacts the plugin produced (SBOMs, signatures, provenance, logs, reports). Defaults to empty.

kind.description: Artifact kind, conventionally one of: sbom, signature, provenance, log, report.

findings.description: Findings the plugin wants surfaced to the user. Defaults to empty.

level.description: Severity, one of: info, warn, error.
